titles: "강을 건너면 다 죽습니다" 최영의 명령을 거부한 이성계, 위화도 회군의 결정적 하룻밤
이성계는 왜 5만 대군을 이끌고 압록강에서 되돌아왔나, 위화도 회군의 숨겨진 진실
500년 고려를 끝낸 단 하루의 결정, 이성계 위화도 회군 | 이성계 EP02

image_concepts.A: 최영 vs 이성계 대치 — 두 장군의 극적 대결

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A. 72세 노장군 최영(좌)과 38세 이성계(우)가 정면으로 대치하는 장면. 두 장군 사이에 번개 같은 긴장감.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, dramatic anime illustration with bold outlines of two Korean Goryeo dynasty generals facing each other in intense confrontation. On the left, an elderly general in his 70s (Choe Yeong) with grey beard, weathered stern face, heavy ornate armor, eyes burning with authority and conviction. On the right, a younger general in his late 30s (Yi Seong-gye) in battle armor, strong jawline, determined but conflicted expression. They stare at each other with palpable tension. Bright dramatic anime atmosphere with vivid saturated colors with strong side lighting emphasizing the clash. Both figures fill the upper 60% of the frame. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 변형. 최영이 명령서를 내밀고, 이성계가 고개를 돌리는 순간. 명령 거부의 결정적 순간.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, cinematic close-up of an elderly Korean general (Choe Yeong, 70s) extending a royal decree scroll toward the viewer with a stern commanding expression, his grey beard sharp against dark armor. Opposite him, a younger general (Yi Seong-gye, late 30s) turns his face away with clenched jaw and conflicted eyes, rejecting the order. Rain begins to fall between them. Dark bright dramatic lighting with warm torchlight on the scroll as the only accent. Both figures in the upper 60% of the frame. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B. 폭우 속 위화도에서 이성계가 정면을 응시한다. 뒤로 범람한 압록강과 지친 병사들.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, dramatic anime illustration with bold outlines of a Korean general (Yi Seong-gye, late 30s) standing in heavy monsoon rain on Wihwado Island. He faces the camera directly with anguished determined eyes, rain streaming down his face and armor. Strong jawline, short trimmed beard, water dripping from his helmet. Behind him, the flooded Yalu River rages and exhausted soldiers huddle in mud. Bright dramatic atmosphere with warm golden-amber tones with bright highlights and dramatic rain effects. He fills the upper 60% of the frame. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 변형. 범람한 압록강을 바라보며 결단하는 이성계의 측면 클로즈업.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, dramatic side-profile close-up of a Korean general (Yi Seong-gye, late 30s) in rain-soaked Goryeo armor, staring at the raging flooded Yalu River. His jaw is clenched, a single tear or raindrop runs down his cheek. Strong jawline, short beard, intense eyes reflecting the churning water. Behind him, barely visible through the rain, thousands of cold and sick soldiers wait for his decision. Dark atmosphere with cold blue tones and dramatic rain. He fills the upper 60% of the frame. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. 이성계가 말 위에서 뒤를 돌아보며 '돌아간다'를 선언하는 순간. 뒤로 5만 대군.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Vivid anime-style illustration with bold black ink outlines and cel-shaded coloring, dramatic anime illustration with bold outlines of a Korean general (Yi Seong-gye, late 30s) on horseback, turning his body to look back at the viewer with a fierce resolute expression. He raises one armored fist as if giving a command to turn back. Behind him, an enormous army of 50,000 Goryeo soldiers stretches into the misty rain, their banners sagging in the downpour. The general's face is lit by a single torch, creating dramatic chiaroscuro. Rain pours down. He occupies the upper 60% of the frame. The bottom 40% of the image is pure solid black (#000000), completely empty with no elements.
